add_context_or_instructions_for_collabor: Add context or instructions for collaborators...
add_contextual_annotations_directly_onto: Add contextual annotations directly onto the workflow canvas.
use_note_blocks_to_document_decisions_sh: Use Note blocks to document decisions, share instructions, or leave context for collaborators directly on the workflow canvas. Notes support Markdown rendering and YouTube video embeds.
write_your_note_using_markdown_youtube_l: Write your note using Markdown. YouTube links will display as embedded videos.
